publicV1.reason: Only the internal self-update staging shell script text changes (apps/api/src/self-update, outside every public-surface path category); no /v1 operation, schema, status code, or error body is touched.

mcp.reason: No MCP tool, argument, result, registration, or transport behavior changes; MCP has no self-update surface.

openapi.reason: The OpenAPI projection covers Public V1 only; nothing it projects changes.

apiPlayground.reason: The Playground catalogs Public V1 operations only and gains no entry from an internal updater script fix.

internalOnly.reason: Makes the BoxLite release-asset staging extraction ownership-independent (tar no longer restores archive uid/gid, which chown-restricted shared mounts such as colima/virtiofs forbid) and sweeps stale temp extraction directories before staging, so one-click self-update no longer dies at the extract step on macOS/colima hosts.
